confirm.applyRoadGroup.messageMiddle: in the whole city change to
confirm.applyRoadGroup.title: Apply Road Group Speed?
confirm.applySubway.message: All subway track in the whole city changes to
confirm.applySubway.title: Apply Subway Speed?
confirm.applyTrain.message: All train track in the whole city changes to
confirm.applyTrain.title: Apply Train Speed?
confirm.resetAll.message:
Clear mod's custom speeds from All: roads, rails, and waterways.
Save city to keep the reset.
confirm.resetAll.title: Reset All Custom Speeds?
confirm.resetRails.message:
Clear mod's custom speeds from all rails.
Restores defaults when known.
Save city to keep the reset.
confirm.resetRails.title: Reset Custom Rail Speeds?
confirm.resetRoads.message:
Clear mod's custom speeds from all roads.
Restores defaults when known.
Save city to keep the reset.
confirm.resetRoads.title: Reset Custom Road Speeds?
confirm.resetWater.message:
Clear mod's custom speeds from all waterways.
Restores defaults when known.
Save city to keep the reset.
confirm.resetWater.title: Reset Custom Water Speeds?
help.directions:
Select a road, rail, or waterway.
Drag for many segments.
Click Apply after setting the slider or number box.
Save the city to keep changes.
help.firstSegmentHint: Current is the first segment selected.
help.tooltipsOff: Tooltips are OFF for Speed Limits. Click this to turn ON.
help.tooltipsOn: Tooltips are ON, click this to turn OFF.
help.unitLine:
a = Auto by map
 type NA/EU
hint.instruction: Click (or click and drag multiple) to select road, rail, or waterway segments
hint.title: Road • Rail • Water Speeds
panel.title: All Speed Limits
reminder.saveAfterReset: Reset done — SAVE City to keep.
stats.bikes.label: Bikes
stats.bikes.tooltip:
All bikes + electric scooters.
 Parked = all parked, not just parking lots.
stats.buses.label: Buses
stats.cars.label: Cars
stats.cars.tooltip: Personal vehicles only: excludes bikes, trailers.
stats.industry.label: Service + freight
stats.industry.tooltip: Industry delivery + Service (e.g. garbage, repair trucks). Excludes public transit, private vehicles/bikes.
stats.taxis.label: Taxis
toolbar.tooltip: Adjust road, rail, and water speeds
tooltips.apply: Apply the new speed to selected segments.
tooltips.applySubway: Apply the New speed to every Subway track in the city.
tooltips.applyTrain: Apply the New speed to every Train track in the city.
tooltips.currentSpeed:
Current speed refers only to the
first segment selected.
tooltips.gameDefault.text:
Default is from prefab data, not sign/decal art.
Road decals can be rounded or decorative.
A road marked 25 or 35 may show a different real value.
tooltips.gameDefault.title: Game default speed
tooltips.markersHide: Speed numbers are ON. Click to hide floating numbers over e.g. roads.
tooltips.markersShow: Speed numbers are OFF. Click to show floating numbers over e.g. roads.
tooltips.preciseStepper: Fine tune by 1 unit. Hold to repeat.
tooltips.presets: Presets apply immediately. Apply not needed.
tooltips.presetUnlimited.text:
Roads and rails: 400 km/h.
Matches the game's Unlimited highway policy.
tooltips.presetUnlimited.title: Unlimited preset
tooltips.reset: Restore selected segments to game default.
tooltips.resetAll.text:
Roads, Rails, Water, or All clears that type.
Restores defaults when known.
Save afterward to keep.
tooltips.resetAll.title: Reset custom speeds
tooltips.roadGroupApply.text:
Choose Small, Med, Large, or Hwy.
Uses New speed.
tooltips.roadGroupApply.title: Apply to road group
tooltips.roadGroups.highway.text:
Examples: Two-Lane, Five-Lane.
Uses New speed.
tooltips.roadGroups.highway.title: Highways
tooltips.roadGroups.large.text:
Examples: Six-Lane, Eight-Lane.
Uses New speed.
tooltips.roadGroups.large.title: Large roads
tooltips.roadGroups.medium.text:
Examples: Four-Lane, Five-Lane.
Uses New speed.
tooltips.roadGroups.medium.title: Medium roads
tooltips.roadGroups.small.text:
Examples: Two-Lane, Alley.
Uses New speed.
tooltips.roadGroups.small.title: Small roads
tooltips.selectedSegment: Selected shows details for the first segment you picked.
tooltips.stats.text:
Cars exclude bikes + trailers.
Bikes = bikes + electric scooters.
Service + freight excludes private cars, bikes, and public transit.
tooltips.stats.title: Stats
tooltips.unit.text:
km = km/h
mi = mph
New Speed toggles only kmh/mph. The small unit button can still use Auto.
tooltips.wholeCity.text:
Apply New speed to a road group.
Reset clears custom speeds by type.
Roads, rails, and water clear separately.
Save the city to keep changes.
tooltips.wholeCity.title: Whole city
